subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Hannen, spoken on 1909-02-23
subcodes.first_line: There is either a standstill or a progression. There could not be a descent, upon the same principle that a man could not become a babe again.
subcodes.subjects: @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @light and darkness, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence
